body:
This PR moves the initial conditions into `src/InitialConditions/`, which is now a new submodule in `src/`.

This should help ensure that we avoid adding in new closures over global variables. We could alternatively
 - Created a new package, `ClimaAtmosInitialConditions`, but this would require more infrastructure, CI etc.
 - Moved the code into a submodule, but this would trigger more recompilation upon re-including the module

I think that `ClimaAtmosInitialConditions` is a nice idea in the long run, but this is a compromise for now while we're still unifying the ICs interface (which still needs to be unified with the single column configs)
title: Move some ICs into src

body:
This PR removes `log_pressure_fun` from the cache, and replaces it with two `ColumnField`s. This has two advantages:
 - It seems to reduce compile time for `OrdinaryDiffEq.init()` by ~30%, which is dominating the cost of some of the compressible examples (observed in a previous build, will keep an eye on this one.)
 - It alleviates the need for pressure BCs, since we can just evaluate the pressure solution at the surface
 - Storing the column field is cheaper than storing the entire field, and it's very possibly cheaper than saving the ODE solution.

cc @dennisYatunin
title: Do not cache log_pressure_fun
